headline: Your pension may rely on the ‘optimistic assumption’ that AI will pay off — Moody's sees 'no playbook' for what’s next
summary: The AI bubble is inflated with billions in borrowed money, with no guarantee of a payoff.

headline: The world is crazy but stocks are up?
summary: A markets mystery has perplexed some analysts this year: Why are stocks sitting near all-time highs while the global economy is rocked by geopolitical conflict and inflation pressures?
